campaign_sender.purpose: Client-facing AIKING marketing/outreach campaigns only. Do not send lead campaigns from iCloud, Trilogy, or unrelated personal/work mailboxes.

positioning: You may not need more leads. You may need to stop leaking the ones you already paid for.
approval_policy: Manual approval before outbound for the first 100-200 messages. Sky can research, score and draft automatically; Ash approves send decisions. Real client-facing campaigns must use ash@aiking.info as the sender identity.
